rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN CANNON VS. RITZ FIELDS A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Summary Judgment And/Or Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2020 line 1. Motion For Summary Judgment And/Or Summary Adjudication is DENIED, triable issues of fact re: causation. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LEE & GEORGIOU, INC. VS. 365 LIBERTY, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Mvc Real Estate , Inc. To Join Pending Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF LEE & GEORGIOU, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Mvc Real Estate , Inc. To Join Pending Arbitration is GRANTED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LEE & GEORGIOU, INC. VS. 365 LIBERTY, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants 365 Liberty, Llc And 367 Liberty Street, Llc To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action Pending Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT 365 LIBERTY, LLC, 367 LIBERTY STREET, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants 365 Liberty, LLC And 367 Liberty Street, LLC To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action Pending Arbitration is moot. Action involving all parties shall proceed in arbitration. See ruling on Plaintiff's motion to Compel. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: OLIVIA BAKER ET AL VS. MICHAEL D. WRIGHT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT MICHAEL WRIGHT DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to October 28, 2020 for moving party to provide a courtesy copy of reply. The Court received moving papers and opposition. Courtesy copies to be delivered no later than October 9, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VIOLETA SANCHEZ VS. JEZABEL MORALES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT JEZABEL MORALES DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT VS. FLOYD GAINES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 5, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT FLOYD GAINES DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is transferred to department 304 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on October 5, 2020 by the honorable Anne-Christine Massullo per the order of the presiding judge. =(501/CFH)
